snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedServerSentEventsResumable

client = AsyncSeedServerSentEventsResumable(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    response = await client.completions.stream(
        query="foo",
    )
    async for chunk in response.data:
        yield chunk


asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedServerSentEventsResumable

client = AsyncSeedServerSentEventsResumable(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    response = await client.completions.stream_non_resumable(
        query="bar",
    )
    async for chunk in response.data:
        yield chunk


asyncio.run(main())
